enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, reflecting the emotions of a romantic relationship.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Kavalai Vendam, the song highlights the emotional connection between the lead characters during a pivotal moment.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Armaan Malik and Shashaa Tirpathi.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Un Kadhal Irundhal Podhum was composed by Leon James.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 24, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Kadhal Irundhal Podhum, the romantic duet unfolds a tale of love and yearning, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of the characters in Kavalai Vendam. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. As Armaan Malik and Shashaa Tirpathi's voices intertwine, listeners are taken on an emotional journey that resonates deeply. This song beautifully conveys the essence of love, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Kadhal Irundhal Podhum from Kavalai Vendam beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Armaan Malik and Shashaa Tirpathi, this duet is a melodic treat that resonates with the heart. The collaboration of Leon James's music adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: I searched for a beautiful lotus that came to me. Your time has passed.
I couldn't feel anything with your beauty; it has faded a bit.
In a glance, life has left; it belongs to you.
Don't leave me; I want to live. Your love is enough, enough, enough.
Both my legs are in pain; I came to your door.
I didn't know why it happened, and I got confused.
My heart says not to pretend.
You are my entire world and sky.
I want to connect with your heart.
I wonder if I became a poem by looking at you.
I ask if I can take you with me, even if it burns.
I open my eyes and look; I am lost in the world of dreams.
Your love is enough, enough, enough. Your love is enough, enough, enough.
Your love is enough. Your love is enough. Your love is enough.
